Lyrics.text:
M isedra ady sarotra ve ny fiaina nao
Noho ireo olana marobe izay miseho ?
To a mila hampam oy fo, mampisento,
Inty misy vahaolana la zaiko anao .

Lyrics.label: Ref
Lyrics.text:
Ao ilay Jesosy, vahaolana
H o ahy sy ho anao,
Izy ilay fitiavana sy fiadanana
Raiso izy anio,
Ô ! ekeo ho Mpamonjy anao
Dia ho azonao antoka tokoa
Ny hoavinao.

R aha toa fahoriana indray no mian jady,
Aretina sy ahiahy mandratra fo .
'Reo zava-tsarotra manjo iainanao,
Inty misy vahao lana lazaiko anao
